LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER EUGENE PORFIDO'S PETITON FOR RELIEF FROM GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 945.4 IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 2, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.
ORDER GRANTING PETITION OF EUGENE PORFIDO FOR RELIEF FROM GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 945.4

NTC OF HEARING ON PETITON FOR RELIEF FROM GOVERNMENRT CODE SECTION 945.4 FILED BY PETITIONER PORFIDO, EUGENE HEARING SET FOR MAR-25-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER EUGENE PORFIDO'S PETITION FOR RELIEF FROM GC 945.4 IS GRANTED. PETITIONER HAS MET THE REQUIREMENTS OF CCP 946.6. THE APPLICATION TO RESPONDENT WAS MADE WITHIN A REASONABLE TIME AND PETITIONER ESTABLISHED THAT THE FAILURE TO PRESENT THE CLAIM WAS THROUGH EXCUSABLE NEGLECT. UNDER THE CIRCUMSTANCES, PETITIONER ACTED AS A REASONABLY PRUDENT PERSON WOULD HAVE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Petiton For Relief From Governmenrt Code Section 945.4
Off Calendar Apr-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JOHN J. HUGHES, ESQ., 415.928.4200, FOR PETITIONER EUGENE PORFIDO.
MARK D. LIPTON, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, 415.554.3800, FOR RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PETITIONER EUGENE PORFIDO's Petition For Relief From Government Code Section 945.4 is granted. Petitioner has met the requirements of Code of Civil Procedure section 946.6. The application to Respondent was made within a reasonable time and Petitioner established that the failure to present the claim was through excusable neglect. Under the circumstances, Petitioner acted as a reasonably prudent person would have. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Ntc Of Hearing On Petiton For Relief From Governmenrt Code Section 945.4
Off Calendar Mar-25-2013 Continued To Apr-02-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court modified its tentative ruling. PETITIONER EUGENE PORFIDO's Petiton For Relief From Government Code Section 945.4 is Continued to April 2, 2013 on the Court's own motion. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
